title: Minimal, Accessible, and Investor Friendly, one feature request
text:
The app is excellent. It has everything an investor needs, presented in a clean, minimal, and intuitive UI/UX.

One suggestion: please add an option to create portfolios in the Mutual Funds section, similar to the feature available for Stocks.

Currently, I have to manually calculate how much I’ve invested in equity funds and track their returns because both equity and debt funds are combined in the dashboard. A portfolio feature would make it much easier to organize and visualize different categories, such as wealth-building funds and goal-based funds, while also showing the total investment and returns for each portfolio separately.

This would greatly improve portfolio tracking and provide a much better user experience.

title: Play Store Review
text: I really like this app. It is very user-friendly, simple, and easy to use. However, there are a few improvements needed. The watchlist should show entry price, current price, and % gain/loss so long-term tracking becomes meaningful. It should also show stock split details with an info icon, including date and ratio, to avoid confusion. Adding a whale indicator and AI-based insights for historical data and stock movements would make the app much more powerful and useful for investors.
